riskReasons: Spring Boot 2.5.2 is below the safer 2.7.x Java 21 staging baseline
Gradle wrapper 6.8.3 should be validated before Java 21 builds

workItems.title: Run baseline tests in CI before migration changes
workItems.rationale: A Java migration needs a known failing/passing baseline before changing runtime, framework, or build configuration.

workItems.title: Stage Spring Boot 2.7.x before the Java 21 rollout
workItems.rationale: Spring Boot 2.5.2 is below the safer Spring Boot 2.7.x staging baseline for Java 21 planning.

workItems.title: Validate or upgrade the Gradle wrapper before Java 21
workItems.rationale: Detected Gradle wrapper 6.8.3. Older Gradle versions can block newer Java toolchains.

workItems.title: Replace Java 11 runtime image before Java 21 rollout
workItems.rationale: Detected runtime image openjdk:11.0.10-jre-buster, which does not match the requested Java 21 runtime.

workItems.title: Run OpenRewrite Java 21 recipe in a branch
workItems.rationale: OpenRewrite automation should be reviewable and separate from manual runtime changes.

findings.title: Spring Boot 2.x needs compatibility validation before a Java 21 migration
findings.recommendation: Validate the project on Spring Boot 2.7.x before the Java 21 rollout. Treat Spring Boot 3 as a separate migration because it also introduces Jakarta namespace changes.

findings.title: mockito-inline baseline should be reviewed before Java 21
findings.recommendation: Validate this dependency against the target JDK and upgrade it in a dedicated build-readiness branch.

findings.title: Runtime image should match the requested Java 21 rollout
findings.evidence: Detected runtime image openjdk:11.0.10-jre-buster in build.gradle
findings.recommendation: Update container/runtime images separately from source changes and verify rollback to the previous runtime.

findings.title: OpenRewrite has a Java 21 migration recipe
findings.recommendation: Review and run the suggested OpenRewrite recipe in a branch before manual changes.
